transcript: Martin? Martin, what are you doing? Sleep walking? She told me if I close my eyes She'd tell me secrets. Who said that? Listen. You have to knock. Close your eyes. I don't hear anything. Sorry. I must be dreaming. Nein. Storbritannia Norske Norske What the hell, man? I love you.
